command: systemctl is-active x-ui 2>/dev/null && echo X-UI_ACTIVE || echo X-UI_NOT_FOUND; x-ui settings 2>/dev/null; echo '---IP---'; curl -s4 ifconfig.me; echo ''; echo '---PORTS---'; ss -tlnp | grep -E '(2053|443|8443)' 2>/dev/null; echo '---BBR---'; sysctl net.ipv4.tcp_congestion_control 2>/dev/null
intent: Check 3X-UI VPN status and get panel info
